MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Rosita Garay testifies on her own behalf.

Alicia Ramirez testifies on her own behalf with assistance of Juan Ramirez as Spanish Interpreter. The following documentary evidence is introduced.

Exhibit 1 - DMV Registration
